queue_entry.title: Queue Entry
queue_entry.description: A user waiting in the matchmaking queue.

session.title: Chat Session
session.description: An active chat session between two matched users.

message.title: Chat Message
message.description: A message sent within a chat session.

/queue/{userId}.description: Stores users currently waiting for a match.

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Stores active or ended chat sessions between two users.

/sessions/{sessionId}/messages/{messageI.description: Stores messages for a given chat session.
